DP.233.0000:
...I’m Marley.
...You are?\f
Oh... [0103,0000], will you help me,
please?\f
I want to get through this tunnel.
Will you let me go with you?\f
DP.233.0002:
Marley: ...Pokémon shouldn’t be
hurt... I’ll heal them...
DP.233.0003:
Marley: ...You took so long...
Please, don’t make me wait...\f
I felt a little forlorn waiting...\f
DP.233.0004:
Marley: ...You’re going back...
Too bad... Bye-bye...\f
DP.233.0005:
Marley: ...Oh! This is it.
There’s a stone tablet ahead...\f
I wanted to see the Pokémon that
visits it, that’s all...\f
...I appreciate your escorting me...\f
...Just a little...\f
